prose:
Water HOMO–LUMO gap — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz` (single-point, not optimized). SCF converged in 7 cycles; no warnings reported.

Reproducibility:
• Command:
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpz3cpl1p1/live.json`
• Live log (stdout/stderr): `frontier_<timestamp>.out` in the working directory (can `tail -f` while running).
• Output JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpz3cpl1p1/live.json`

Results:
• HOMO = –8.6037183 eV
• LUMO = +0.33695037 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV
